query: SELECT s.id, s.userId, s.stripeCustomerId, s.stripeSubscriptionId, s.status, s.startedAt, s.isInInitialPeriod, s.currentPeriodEnd, s.canceledAt, s.createdAt, s.updatedAt FROM subscriptions s ORDER BY s.id DESC;
